title: Eanca Goa-Ato
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Eanca_Goa-Ato.jpg|thumb|Eanca Goa-Ato]]
'''Eanca Goa-Ato''', also known as the '''Grand Protector's Hunters' Guild Hall''', was located in the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] city of [[Iskaayuma/Legends|Iskaayuma]] on [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]. 

It was a large complex of buildings that expanded from an ancient [[Awards Hall]], which initially housed written and video records of the greatest hunters, itself added on numerous times over the years. The Eanca Goa-Ato eventually contained the offices of the [[Goa-Ato/Legends|Goa-Ato]]. The complex also housed the [[Grand Protector's Chambers]] and the [[Chronicle Room]] containing records of the hunts of Goa-Ato members. 

The Eanca Goa-Ato hosted the annual Rodian hunting awards, the [[Atiang/Legends|Atiang]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-10-XXF -->''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''
